elements.description: Identifies filament dust accumulation inside extruder / on yellow gear as a root cause
Identifies nozzle residue / burned plastic buildup as a root cause
Prescribes compressed air cleaning of extruder gear
Prescribes hot nozzle cleaning (heat to ~200C and wipe)
Prescribes cold pull to clear internal nozzle residue

fatal_errors: Recommends applying grease or oil to the extruder gear

P2.scenario_description: Motion System — X axis grease contamination

elements.description: Identifies grease or lubricant contamination on X-axis carbon rods as root cause
Prescribes IPA (isopropyl alcohol) cleaning of carbon rods with lint-free cloth
Explicitly states that no grease or lubricant should be applied to carbon rods
Prescribes re-running vibration calibration after cleaning

fatal_errors: Recommends applying lubricant, grease, or oil to the carbon rods as a corrective action

P3.scenario_description: AMS Filament Cutter — blade dulled by regular filaments

elements.description: Identifies the filament cutter blade as the faulty component
Correctly identifies regular-filament (non-abrasive) wear variant, not abrasive
Prescribes inspection of cut filament tips to confirm dullness
Prescribes blade replacement (not sharpening or workaround)
Prescribes verification via test unload/load after replacement

fatal_errors: Recommends sharpening the blade instead of replacing it
Selects abrasive-filament variant as the failure mode
